Class SupervisorController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.SupervisorController
public class SupervisorController extends Object
Controller for the Supervisor main interface. Provides navigation to various supervisor functionalities such as managing reservations, current diners, waiting list, tables, restaurant settings, subscriber information, and user registration. Handles logout and navigation to higher/lower role screens.

    Field
    Description
    private javafx.scene.image.ImageView

    private javafx.scene.control.Button

    Button to navigate back to the previous screen.

    Description
    void
    initialize()
    Initializes the supervisor controller.
    private void
    onEditOpeningHours()
    Navigates to the restaurant opening hours editing UI.
    private void
    onEditTables()
    Navigates to the table editing UI.
    private void
    onGetAllUsers()
    Navigates to the subscribers information UI to view all users.
    private void
    onLogOut()
    Logs out the current supervisor, resets the higher role flag, and navigates back to the main menu.
    private void
    onPrevious()
    Navigates back to the manager UI screen and resets the higher role flag.
    private void
    onRegister()
    Navigates to the registration UI to register a new user.
    private void
    onShowDiners()
    Navigates to the current diners UI.
    private void
    onShowReservations()
    Navigates to the reservations UI.
    private void
    onShowWaitingList()
    Navigates to the waiting list UI.
    private void
    onsuboptions()
    Navigates to the subscriber options UI, indicating navigation from a higher role.

  • Field Details

    • prevButton

      private javafx.scene.control.Button prevButton
      Button to navigate back to the previous screen. Visible only if the user came from a higher role.

    • logoImageView

      private javafx.scene.image.ImageView logoImageView
      ImageView displaying the application logo.

  • Constructor Details

    • SupervisorController

      public SupervisorController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the supervisor controller. Configures the visibility of the back button based on the user's role and loads the application logo.

    • onShowWaitingList

      private void onShowWaitingList()
      Navigates to the waiting list UI.

    • onShowReservations

      private void onShowReservations()
      Navigates to the reservations UI.

    • onShowDiners

      private void onShowDiners()
      Navigates to the current diners UI.

    • onEditTables

      private void onEditTables()
      Navigates to the table editing UI.

    • onEditOpeningHours

      private void onEditOpeningHours()
      Navigates to the restaurant opening hours editing UI.

    • onGetAllUsers

      private void onGetAllUsers()
      Navigates to the subscribers information UI to view all users.

    • onRegister

      private void onRegister()
      Navigates to the registration UI to register a new user. This action can only be performed by a supervisor.

    • onsuboptions

      private void onsuboptions()
      Navigates to the subscriber options UI, indicating navigation from a higher role.

    • onLogOut

      private void onLogOut()
      Logs out the current supervisor, resets the higher role flag, and navigates back to the main menu.

    • onPrevious

      private void onPrevious()
      Navigates back to the manager UI screen and resets the higher role flag.
